query:
SELECT
                COALESCE(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (mr.read_at - m.created_at)) / 3600.0), 0.0) as "avg_hours!: f64",
                COUNT(*) as "responded!"
            FROM messages m
            JOIN message_reads mr ON mr.message_id = m.id
            WHERE m.recipient_party_id = $1
              AND m.created_at > $2
              AND m.message_type = 'TEXT'
